## Definition of Done

- [ ] Planner runs in the target environment.
- [ ] Planner produces valid trajectories.
- [ ] Benchmark compatibility is verified.
- [ ] Any adapter limitations are documented.

## Success Metrics

- The planner can be invoked through the repo's normal workflow.
- The benchmark reports stable, reproducible outputs.
- Any fallback or degraded mode is explicitly documented.

## Validation / Testing

- [ ] Run a representative scenario.
- [ ] Confirm the planner passes the target contract test.
- [ ] Run the repository validation gate.
